description: Harmonized etymology matrix unifying Latin, Greek, Canon Law, and modern English concepts with semantic lineage and drift analysis
drift_score_methodology: Drift score (0.0-1.0) measures semantic change from classical origins to modern usage. Lower scores indicate stable meaning; higher scores indicate significant evolution.

semantic_lineage: Greek: rightful order, lawsuit → Latin: justice → English: fairness, legal system

era_meanings.roman_law: Virtue of giving each their due, legal justice
era_meanings.modern: Equal application of law, procedural fairness, distributive justice

semantic_lineage: Greek: custom, convention → Latin: statute → English: legal rule

era_meanings.medieval_canon: Hierarchy: eternal, divine, natural, human law
era_meanings.modern: Positive law, statute, regulation, constitutional provision
